title: ecp5: LiteX dual clock memory may fail to map to DP16KD

features.name: dual_clock_asymmetric_memory
features.description: Code should include a dual-clock asymmetric memory where write operations occur on one clock domain and the read address is registered on a different clock domain

features.name: unpacked_array_memory_combinational_output
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array memory with a combinational (unregistered) output read, where only the read address is registered on a separate clock

features.name: memory_read_with_separate_addr_clock
features.description: Code should include a memory where the write enable and address use one clock domain while the read address uses a different clock domain with no output registration
